mapper.select: SELECT id, zone_id, seat_number, status FROM seat WHERE zone_id = #{zoneId} ORDER BY seat_number

SELECT s.id, s.zone_id, s.seat_number, s.status FROM seat s INNER JOIN zone z ON z.id = s.zone_id LEFT JOIN stand st ON st.id = z.stand_id WHERE z.session_id = #{sessionId} OR st.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY z.id, s.seat_number
